t:r.startsWith(\"error sending request for url\")?!0:errorMessages.has(r)}function validateRetries(t){if(typeof t==\"number\"){if(t<0)throw new TypeError(\"Expected `retries` to be a non-negative number.\");if(Number.isNaN(t))throw new TypeError(\"Expected `retries` to be a valid number or Infinity, got NaN.\")}else if(t!==void 0)throw new TypeError(\"Expected `retries` to be a number or Infinity.\")}function validateNumberOption(t,e,{min:r=0,allowInfinity:n=!1}={}){if(e!==void 0){if(typeof e!=\"number\"||Number.isNaN(e))throw new TypeError(`Expected \\`${t}\\` to be a number${n?\" or Infinity\":\"\"}.`);if(!n&&!Number.isFinite(e))throw new TypeError(`Expected \\`${t}\\` to be a finite number.`);if(e<r)throw new TypeError(`Expected \\`${t}\\` to be ≥ ${r}.`)}}class AbortError extends Error{constructor(e){super(),e instanceof Error?(this.originalError=e,{message:e}=e):(this.originalError=new Error(e),this.originalError.stack=this.stack),this.name=\"AbortError\",this.message=e}}function calculateDelay(t,e){const r=Math.max(1,t+1),n=e.randomize?Math.random()+1:1;let s=Math.round(n*e.minTimeout*e.factor**(r-1));return s=Math.min(s,e.maxTimeout),s}function calculateRemainingTime(t,e){return Number.isFinite(e)?e-(performance.now()-t):e}async function onAttemptFailure({error:t,attemptNumber:e,retriesConsumed:r,startTime:n,options:s}){const a=t instanceof Error?t:new TypeError(`Non-error was thrown: \"${t}\". const __MIME_TYPES__ = {
  '.html': 'text/html; charset=utf-8',
  '.js': 'application/javascript; charset=utf-8',
  '.css': 'text/css; charset=utf-8',
  '.json': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
  '.svg': 'image/svg+xml',
  '.png': 'image/png',
  '.ico': 'image/x-icon',
  '.woff': 'font/woff',
  '.woff2': 'font/woff2',
  '.ttf': 'font/ttf',
  '.webmanifest': 'application/manifest+json',
};

function __getMime__(path) {
  const ext = path.substring(path.lastIndexOf('.'));
  return __MIME_TYPES__[ext] || 'application/octet-stream';
}

function __base64ToArrayBuffer__(b64) {
  const bin = atob(b64);
  const buf = new Uint8Array(bin.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < bin.length; i++) buf[i] = bin.charCodeAt(i);
  return buf.buffer;
}

// Mock ASSETS fetcher that serves from embedded file map
const __assetsFetcher__ = {
  fetch(request) {
    const url = new URL(typeof request === 'string' ? request : request.url);
    let path = url.pathname;
    if (path.endsWith('/')) path += 'index.html';
    if (path.startsWith('/')) path = path.slice(1);

    if (path in __ASSETS__) {
      const content = __ASSETS__[path];
      if (typeof content === 'string' && content.startsWith('base64:')) {
        return new Response(__base64ToArrayBuffer__(content.slice(7)), {
          headers: { 'Content-Type': __getMime__(path), 'Cache-Control': 'public, max-age=31536000, immutable' },
        });
      }
      return new Response(content, {
        headers: { 'Content-Type': __getMime__(path) },
      });
    }

    // SPA fallback
    if ('index.html' in __ASSETS__) {
      return new Response(__ASSETS__['index.html'], {
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8' },
      });
    }
    return new Response('Not Found', { status: 404 });
  }
};

// === Wrapper: inject ASSETS mock into env ===
export default {
  async fetch(request, env, ctx) {
    env.ASSETS = __assetsFetcher__;
    return __dashboard_core__.fetch(request, env, ctx);
  }
};
